articles.title: FOCUS | China to hold gathering marking CPC's 105th founding anniversary
articles.description: (260701) -- BEIJING, July 1, 2026 (Xinhua) -- The motorcade carrying recipients of the July 1 Medal is accompanied by motorcycle escorts on the way to the Great Hall of the People in Beijing, capital of China, July 1, 2026. China will hold a gathering to celebrate the 105th founding anniversary of the Communist Party of China (CPC) at 10 a.m. Wednesday at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing. (Xinhua/Wang Ye)
